name: BambooHR
tagline: All-in-one HR software with AI-enhanced people management
description: BambooHR is a comprehensive HR platform designed for small and medium businesses. It combines core HR functions—employee records, time-off tracking, onboarding, and reporting—with AI-powered insights. BambooHR's automated workflows streamline onboarding, offboarding, and approvals, while its analytics provide actionable workforce insights on turnover, headcount, and employee satisfaction.
